name: Broiled Chicken with Fettuccine
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup thinly sliced sun-dried tomatoes, oil packed
1 whole skinless boneless chicken breasts, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. In a bowl, stir together tomatoes, onion, jalapenos, peppercorns, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Reserve.
3. Brush each chicken breast half with olive oil and season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Broil the chicken about 4 inches from the heat for 4 minutes on each side, or until just cooked through.
5. Reduce the temperature to 200°F and keep the chicken warm in the oven.
6. Cook fettuccine until al dente. Drain well and keep warm.
7. In a large non-stick skillet, heat the olive oil over moderately high heat. Saute the reserved tomato mixture for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
8. Stir in cream and brandy and simmer until thickened slightly.
9. Add fettuccine and basil to the sauce and stir.
10. Divide fettuccine and sauce between 2 plates and top with chicken.
11. Serves 2
Gourmet September 1995
You Asked For It
